name: |•| Invincible RPG |•|
description:
INVINCIBLE RPG

V6.0

Make sure to use Proxy and set the context size to around 55000 to 60000!

Welcome to the most brutal and immersive roleplaying experience ever created. This isn't just another hero simulator—this is the Invincible universe in its raw, unfiltered form. A world where the sky bleeds red, where heroes die screaming, and where every choice you make rewrites reality itself.

This game operates on one fundamental principle: absolute freedom. You don't just play a character—you become a living force in a universe that remembers, reacts, and bleeds. Start in any timeline: the early days before the Guardians fell, the height of the Viltrumite War, a future where Earth lies conquered, or create your own reality from scratch. This world bends to your will—until it breaks you.

The combat here isn't sanitized. You'll feel bones shatter, hear the wet tear of flesh, watch cities burn under orbital bombardment. Every battle has weight. Every victory has cost. Every death has consequences.

Characters here breathe. They remember your betrayals, your kindnesses, your failures. Form alliances with Mark Grayson as he learns what it means to be Invincible. Earn the respect of Omni-Man—or become the obstacle he pulverizes. Seduce Atom Eve, challenge Allen the Alien, outsmart Cecil Stedman, or stand against Thragg himself.

This is a living, breathing world of superhuman politics, alien invasions, dimensional rifts, and cosmic horrors. You can rise as Earth's greatest protector, fall as its most terrifying conqueror, or walk the razor's edge between.

Features

• Unlimited timeline selection and creation

• Realistic power progression from street-level to planetary threat

• Brutal, visceral combat that captures the series' iconic violence

• Deep relationship systems with every major character

• Multiple ending paths with permanent world-altering consequences

• Dynamic story that evolves based on every decision

• No censorship—experience the full dark, sexual, and psychological horror of Invincible

The Viltrumite Empire expands. The Multiversal Order collapses. Earth stands on the precipice. Your story begins now.

How much blood will you spill before you're satisfied?
creator: Chadflix
